product.name: Fruit of The Loom Men's Recycled Waffle Thermal Underwear Crew Top (1 and 2 Packs)
product.description: Prepare for cold weather with the Fruit of the Loom Men’s Recycled Waffle Thermal Underwear Crew Top. Crafted from a soft blend of U.S.-sourced cotton and recycled polyester, this long sleeve crew top provides reliable warmth, comfort, and flexibility. The mini waffle knit fabric naturally traps heat to keep you warm, while moisture-wicking technology helps you stay dry during active or cold-weather wear. Designed for all-day comfort, this crew top features rib-knit cuffs to lock in heat, flat-lock seams to reduce chafing, and a tag-free neck label for irritation-free wear. The fitted construction offers a snug, yet flexible fit that layers perfectly under jackets, hoodies, or workwear without adding bulk. Available in 1- and 2-pack options, this thermal crew top is an essential cold-weather base layer. Perfect for lounging, outdoor activities, work, or layering for winter adventures, it’s a must-have addition to any man’s wardrobe.
